Sk Elctronics |mode=squads|perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr|prizepool=700000 |country=India |sdate=2024-11-11 |edate=2024-11-16 |web= |facebook= |discord= |youtube=@TMG_eSports |loco= |instagram=team_modern_gaming |instagram2=1m.events |next=DYNASTY/Season_2{{!}}Season 2 }} '''1M DYNASTY''' is a BGMI tournament. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{BroadcasterCard |position=Production talent |b1=DSTRXN|b1flag=in|b1name=Nitish Singh Basera |b2=TR1GN0|b2flag=in|b2name=Harsh Saxena }} {{BroadcasterCard |position=Commentators |lang=Hindi |b1=Raider |b1flag=in |b1name=Shashank Singh |b2=RusherCast |b2flag=in |b2name=Rusher }} ===Format=== * '''Pre Quarter Finals:''''' November 4th - 7th, 2024 ** 64 teams, 4 matchdays. *** 32 invited team. *** 32 Underdogs team. ** Teams are divided equally into 4 groups of 16. ** Each group will play 6 matches in 4 days. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 12 team from each group (Total 48 teams)}} advance to Quarter Finals.
* '''Quarter Finals:''''' November 8th - 10th, 2024 ** 48 teams, 3 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 16. ** Each group will play 6 matches in 3 days. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 team from each group (Total 24 teams)}} advance to Semi Finals.
* '''Semi Finals:''''' November 11th - 13th, 2024 ** 24 teams, 3 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8. ** Each group will play 12 matches in 3 days. ** Round-robin format. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} advance to the Grand Finals.
* '''Grand Finals:''''' November 14th - 16th, 2024 ** 16 teams, 3 matchdays. ** 18 matches (6 each day). ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool |{{Slot|localprize=300000|{{Opponent|Troy Tamilan Esports}} }}
